name: Chicken with Garlic and Parsley
recipeIngredient: 1 chicken, cut in half and deboned
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare charcoal grill.
2. Place unpeeled garlic cloves in a pan of cold water. Bring gradually to boil, lower heat and simmer for 3-4 minutes. Drain.
3. Peel the garlic cloves and finely slice them.
4. Combine the sliced garlic with parsley. Stuff half this mixture under the skin of both chicken halves.
5. Season the chicken with salt and pepper.
6. Place the seasoned chicken over hot charcoal and grill about 5 minutes on each side, or until just tender.
7. Meanwhile, melt butter in a small skillet and sauté the remaining garlic/parsley mixture with lemon juice until warmed through; do not brown.
8. Arrange grilled chicken on a serving platter, top with garlic/parsley sauce, and serve immediately.
